title: Write an Oban worker whose args include a list of ids (JSON-safe)
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.BulkNotificationWorker` (queue `:notifications`, max_attempts 5). perform/1 takes `%{"user_ids" => ids, "template" => template}` where `ids` is a list of integer user ids and template is a string. It should iterate with `Enum.each/2`, calling `MyApp.Notifier.send(id, template)` for each. Include a comment that lists and strings are JSON-safe (unlike tuples, structs, or atoms). Write to `lib/my_app/workers/bulk_notification_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Tests affirmative knowledge of what IS JSON-safe. The comment surfaces the philosophy explicitly.
